title: now_rfc3339() is undocumented custom calendar math with silent clock failure
description: client_task.rs::now_rfc3339() hand-implements Gregorian calendar decomposition (Hinnant algorithm) with no doc comment citing the reference or explaining why a time crate was not used. It silently produces 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z if SystemTime::now() is before UNIX_EPOCH (unwrap_or_default()). A contributor seeing this will either trust it blindly, rewrite it incorrectly, or replace it with a crate without understanding why it was done inline. No test covers it against a known reference timestamp.
